title_en: Spice Up Your Life with Jalapeños!
title_es: ¡Dale Sabor a Tu Vida con Jalapeños!
hook_en: Did you know jalapeños can boost your metabolism?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que los jalapeños pueden acelerar tu metabolismo?
key_message: Jalapeños' capsaicin can boost your metabolism by up to 8% and release endorphins for a feel-good kick. Keep the white ribs for maximum benefits.
visual_elements: Slicing jalapeño to show white ribs
Cooking jalapeños in a sizzling pan
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Jalapeño — Capsaicin boosts metabolism by up to 8% and triggers endorphin release (Tip: The white ribs (not seeds) hold most of the capsaicin — remove for milder, keep for max benefit)

title_en: Heat Things Up with Jalapeño Tips!
hook_en: Want to make your jalapeños milder?
key_message: For a milder jalapeño, remove the white ribs. To keep the heat and enjoy max capsaicin benefits, leave them in.
visual_elements: Split screen: jalapeño with seeds and ribs vs. without
Text overlay: 'Keep ribs for max heat'
Biting into a jalapeño and smiling
Endorphin release animation with happy faces
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Jalapeño — Capsaicin boosts metabolism by up to 8% and triggers endorphin release (Tip: The white ribs (not seeds) hold most of the capsaicin — remove for milder, keep for max benefit)
